description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of shoes is one reason why we love the summer! This season fantastical bursts of colour and bright metallic tones are SO in! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsStrap upper in V-shape with a fibre toe separatorElastane strip holding the toe separator and ankle strap togetherAnkle strap made of synthetic leather for greater durabilityFootbed with a raw silk finishRubber outsole with a floral lug at the heelBranding on the forefoot doubling up as flex groovesMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
